# Youssef Baamel

> Full-Stack Engineer with 5+ years shipping production web and mobile apps.

## About

Youssef Baamel is a Full-Stack Engineer based in Rabat, Morocco. Currently working at BTECHNOLOGIE, the exclusive partner of Bouygues Telecom and Accenture, building client-facing web and mobile applications with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and AWS.

Stack: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Django, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Docker, AWS, React Native, Directus CMS.

Open to full-time engineering roles in Europe.

## Experience

- **Front End Engineer** at BTECHNOLOGIE · Bouygues Telecom x Accenture (Jan 2025 – Present)
  Building client-facing web & mobile apps with React, Next.js, TypeScript. Directus CMS, AWS.

- **Full Stack Engineer** at 1450 Factory · Blink Pharma (Sep 2023 – Sep 2024)
  Built blinkpharma.ma — original Python backend, Next.js fullstack migration.

- **Full Stack Engineer** at MEDIOT (Jun 2023 – Sep 2023)
  Medical-sector apps with React.js and Node.js in Agile environment.

- **Full Stack Engineer** at Algo Consulting Group · ONCF (Jan 2022 – Mar 2023)
  Supratours and ONCF Voyages train-ticket platforms, RTL Arabic localization.

- **Full Stack Developer** — Freelance (Feb 2020 – Dec 2021)
  Python (Django), Node.js, React.js, Vue.js for various clients.

## Projects

- **Heald — Put Yourself First**: iOS Health & Fitness app (React Native, 2025). Available on App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/heald-put-yourself-first/id6756617487

- **Blink Premium**: Medical iOS app for pharmaceutical professionals (React Native, 2024). Available on App Store: https://apps.apple.com/ma/app/blink-premium/id1482286159

- **Debrief**: Open-source AI meeting summarizer. Transcribes audio with Whisper, generates structured summaries, action items, and decisions using LLMs. Built with FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Celery, Redis.

## Education

Bachelor's degree, Computer Science — ENSET Mohammedia (2022)
